name: edge-agents
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for Edge operator, maintenance, ChatGPT-app, review, and thesis-bootstrap workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded operator, maintenance, app-surface, review, and thesis-bootstrap workflows for Edge.
interface.longDescription: Project-local Codex plugin for Edge. It wraps the repo's canonical make, edge operator, and edge-chatgpt-app surfaces with reusable Codex skills, maintenance routing, proposal inspection helpers, run-review helpers, developer wrappers, and guardrail hooks for bounded research, diagnosis, app upkeep, and thesis packaging.
defaultPrompt: Explain and plan a bounded proposal using the Edge operator workflow.
Route a repo change through the right validation and generated-doc maintenance loop.
Inspect or develop the Edge ChatGPT app surface without bypassing canonical operator flows.
Diagnose an Edge run and decide keep, modify, or kill.
Package tested claims through the thesis bootstrap lane.
